Ibn Haldun Academy ‘26

Event Location

Campus

Activity Start

2026-04-11 09:00

Activity End

2026-05-16 17:00

Ibn Haldun Academy 2026 program will be held on Saturdays between April 11-May 16 at the Ibn Haldun University Başakşehir Complex. Organized around the theme “Bakışın Sınırları ve Ötesi” (The Limits of the Gaze and Beyond), applications for the program will be accepted via the website from March 4 to April 4. In addition to attending panels and seminars featuring expert speakers, participants can also participate in the essay competition with incentive awards.

The program is in Turkish language.

For detailed information and application:

https://ibnhaldunakademi.com
